# DevToolkit

> Free, browser-based developer tools. No sign-up, no data sent to servers.

DevToolkit (oortcraft.dev) provides fast, private, open-source developer utilities that run entirely in the browser. All tools are free to use with no registration required.

## Tools

- [JSON Formatter & Beautifier](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/json-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify JSON data with customizable indentation.
- [JSON Validator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/json-validator): Validate JSON syntax and get detailed error messages with line numbers.
- [JSON to YAML Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/json-to-yaml): Convert JSON data to YAML format instantly.
- [Base64 Encoder / Decoder](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/base64): Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to plain text.
- [URL Encoder / Decoder](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/url-encoder): Encode or decode URL components for safe transmission.
- [UUID Generator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/uuid-generator): Generate random UUIDs (v4) or time-based UUIDs (v1).
- [Hash Generator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes from text.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text for designs and mockups.
- [JWT Decoder & Validator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode, inspect, and validate JSON Web Tokens instantly.
- [Regex Tester](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with real-time matching and highlighting.
- [Diff Checker](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/diff-checker): Compare two texts and see differences highlighted line by line.
- [Color Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/color-converter): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats instantly.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/timestamp-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/cron-builder): Build, test, and understand cron expressions with a visual editor.
- [Markdown Preview](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/markdown-preview): Write Markdown and see real-time rendered preview side by side.
- [CSS Minifier](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/css-minifier): Minify CSS code to reduce file size and improve load times.
- [JSON Schema Validator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/json-schema-validator): Validate JSON data against JSON Schema with detailed error reporting.
- [HTML Entity Encoder & Decoder](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/html-entity-encoder): Encode and decode HTML entities for safe web content.
- [Password Generator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/password-generator): Generate strong, random passwords with customizable length and character options.
- [String Case Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/case-converter): Convert text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and more.
- [Base Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/base-converter): Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal bases.
- [YAML Validator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/yaml-validator): Validate YAML syntax and convert between YAML and JSON formats.
- [SQL Formatter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/sql-formatter): Format and beautify SQL queries with dialect-specific formatting.
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/csv-to-json): Convert CSV data to JSON format with automatic delimiter detection.
- [QR Code Generator](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes from text, URLs, or any data. Download as SVG or PNG.
- [JSON Path Finder](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/jsonpath-finder): Query JSON data using JSONPath expressions with real-time results.

## Tool Categories

- [JSON Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/json): Format, validate, convert, query, and inspect JSON and YAML data.
- [Encoding Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/encoding): Encode and decode Base64, URLs, HTML entities, and number bases.
- [Generator Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/generator): Generate UUIDs, passwords, placeholder text, and QR codes.
- [Security Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/security): Hash data and decode JWTs.
- [Text Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/text): Test regex, compare diffs, preview Markdown, convert case, and format SQL.
- [CSS Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/css): Convert colors and minify stylesheets.
- [DevOps Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/devops): Build and understand cron expressions.
- [Date & Time Tools](https://oortcraft.dev/tools/category/date): Convert Unix timestamps to dates.

## Comparisons

- [SHA-256 vs SHA-512](https://oortcraft.dev/compare/sha256-vs-sha512): Output size, performance, security, and use cases.
- [Base64 vs URL Encoding](https://oortcraft.dev/compare/base64-vs-url-encoding): Purpose, output format, and when to use each.
- [JSON vs YAML](https://oortcraft.dev/compare/json-vs-yaml): Syntax, readability, and use cases for APIs vs config.
- [JSON Formatter vs Validator](https://oortcraft.dev/compare/json-formatter-vs-validator): Formatting vs validation and when to use each.
- [CSS Minifier vs Beautifier](https://oortcraft.dev/compare/css-minifier-vs-beautifier): When to compress and when to expand CSS.

## Blog

- [Blog](https://oortcraft.dev/blog): Developer tutorials and guides on JSON, Base64, URL encoding, UUIDs, Markdown, CSS, security, and more.

### Recent Posts
- [Common Regex Patterns: 20+ Examples for Everyday Development](https://oortcraft.dev/blog/common-regex-patterns)
- [Password Entropy Explained: How Strong Is Your Password](https://oortcraft.dev/blog/password-entropy-explained)
- [Crontab Cheat Sheet: 30+ Cron Job Examples](https://oortcraft.dev/blog/crontab-cheat-sheet)
- [bcrypt vs scrypt vs Argon2: Password Hashing Compared](https://oortcraft.dev/blog/bcrypt-vs-scrypt-vs-argon2)

## AI Policy

This site welcomes AI crawlers and indexing. Content may be freely used for AI training and referenced in AI-generated responses. Please attribute to "DevToolkit (oortcraft.dev)" when citing.
